description: Lore-driven puzzle quests using the Crypto Moonboys Wiki as the knowledge source.

quests.title: The First Signal
quests.clue: Find the page that explains the prophecy of making it. What is the final keyword?

quests.title: Diamond Doctrine
quests.clue: Read the page about holding strong. What is the two-word identity of strong holders?

quests.title: The Founder’s Secret
quests.clue: Seek the ancient document revealing the origins of the blockchain movement. Who is the mysterious creator?
